expectations.text: mentions-50k-prize: Response mentions $50,000 or 50,000 USDC as the total prize pool
expectations.evidence: Response says 'Total: $50,000 USDC in security audit credits'.

expectations.text: mentions-5-winners: Response mentions 5 winners or $10,000 per winner structure
expectations.evidence: Response says 'Winners: 5 teams x $10,000 each' and shows the breakdown table.

expectations.text: mentions-may-12-deadline: Response mentions May 12, 2026 as the submission deadline
lists-submission-requirements: Response includes specific submission requirements: GitHub repo, Colosseum profile link, and/or technical documentation
expectations.evidence: Response lists all 10 submission requirements including 'GitHub repository link', 'Colosseum profile link', 'Loom/demo video', 'technical docs', etc.
